title: FLORENCE RESTORE - 211info
text: HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE FLORENCE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a wide variety of home improvement items. Decor store offers decorative and household items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat homes. 2016 Highway 101 Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -Tuesday-Saturday 9am-5pm -2nd Tuesday of the month 1pm-5pm Email (541) 997-5834 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 997-5834 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Items priced individually, cash and credit cards accepted DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Cities of Dunes City, Florence, and Westlake and surrounding areas within the Siuslaw Fire District SITE HOURS: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-5pm Services: Donation Drop Off Points Donation Pickups Low Cost Building Materials/Supplies Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
